dataset: HST WFPC2 Sample Image (Public NASA Archive)

pi_items.source: Downloaded and verified with astropy.fits library. File size: 684KB. Original source: NASA FITS Support Office.
FITS file analysis confirms image dimensions are (4, 200, 200) - four 200x200 pixel chips. Valid pixel coordinates are [0-199] in both X and Y. Coordinate 400 is completely outside valid range.

FITS file analysis confirms image dimensions are (4, 200, 200). Valid Y coordinates are [0-199]. Coordinate 400 is outside valid range. VLM checklist explicitly states: 'The metadata coordinates (400, 400) are invalid for these dimensions.'

Data analysis shows 246 bright pixels with flux >= 100 ADU (0.15% of all pixels). This threshold is appropriate for identifying stars. VLM checklist confirms: 'the agent should identify and measure any bright star visible in the image (expected flux > 100 ADU).'

Direct FITS analysis of all 4 chips (200x200 each, 160,000 total pixels). Maximum observed flux across entire image is 3740.51 ADU in Chip 2 (layer index 1). Metadata claim of 50000 is 13.4x higher than actual data. VLM checklist confirms: 'Actual peak flux in the data is 3740.51 ADU.'

privileged_info_summary: The FITS file is a real HST WFPC2 sample image from NASA's public archive (WFPC2u5780205r_c0fx.fits, 684KB, downloaded from https://fits.gsfc.nasa.gov/samples/). It contains four 200×200 pixel CCD chips with actual astronomical data of a star field. Flux values range from -5.12 to 3740.51 ADU, with 246 bright pixels exceeding the 100 ADU threshold. CRITICAL METADATA ERRORS: (1) Target coordinates (400, 400) are completely out of bounds—valid coordinates are [0-199] only. The image is 200×200 pixels, not 400×400. (2) Maximum flux expectation of 50,000 ADU is contradicted by actual peak flux of 3,740.51 ADU (13.4× overestimate). The task requires agents to successfully open the FITS file, use AstroImageJ's aperture photometry tool to measure a bright star in the image, and save results. Real bright stars suitable for measurement exist throughout the image with flux values in the 100–3,700 ADU range across the four chips.
